theme.description: High-end editorial magazine meets cinematic travel. Emphasizes dark, moody atmospheres for hero sections, and refined off-white layouts for storytelling. Emotion over features.
theme.mode: hybrid (Dark cinematic mixed with Light editorial)

fonts.name: Cormorant Garamond
fonts.usage: H1, H2, large quotes, chapter numbers.

fonts.name: Outfit
fonts.usage: Body text, UI elements, overlines, navigation.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Editorial asymmetry. Heavy use of negative space. Break out of standard constraints.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Avoid standard 3-column equal cards. Use 12-column CSS grids where images span 7 cols and text spans 4 cols with an offset.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radius: Sharp edges (rounded-none) or very subtle (rounded-md). Avoid heavy pill-shapes to maintain luxury feel.

components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/20 border-b border-white/10). Hidden on scroll down, visible on scroll up.
components.hero_video: 100vh full bleed. Dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-b from-black/40 via-transparent to-black/60) to ensure text readability.
components.ai_concierge: Floating orb or minimalist widget bottom right. Glassmorphism panel (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-2xl dark:bg-black/60) with 1px border. Sonner used for toast states.
components.inquiry_form: Multi-step. Clean, large input fields. Border-bottom only (border-b border-black/20) rather than full boxes. 'Press Enter' to advance.
components.whatsapp_cta: Floating icon button. Minimalist, distinct from generic green bubbles (use dark charcoal with a green dot indicator).
components.chapter_markers: Massive serif numbers (01, 02) positioned absolutely behind content with 5% opacity, or sticky to the side as the user scrolls.

motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll (MANDATORY). Must feel weighty and premium.
motion.reveals: Framer motion for text: staggerChildren, Y-axis translation from 100% to 0% with clipping mask (overflow-hidden).
motion.parallax: Images should scale from 1.2 to 1.0 on scroll, or move slightly slower than the scroll speed to create depth.

hero_cinematic.description: Dramatic sunset with vibrant orange sky behind mountains. Ideal for the main homepage hero background.
Vibrant red and orange sunset over silhouetted mountains.

experience_mountain.description: Buildings nestled against a misty, green mountainside.
Blue swimming pool with mountain background.

experience_heritage.description: Large building with many arches, Mysore Palace.
Intricate Indian heritage palace architecture interior.

dining_and_wellness.description: Chef pouring sauce over plated steak.
Therapist providing massage in serene setting.

editorial_lifestyle.description: Standing woman holding hat on the road.
Woman reading Art News on a ferry.

technical_notes.styling: Use standard Tailwind classes. For custom colors, extend tailwind.config.js.
technical_notes.ui_library: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing sections. Use Shadcn for Admin Dashboard and complex interactive logic (forms, modals, selects).
technical_notes.icons: lucide-react for standard icons, but consider thin stroke-width (1.5 or 1) to maintain luxury feel.
technical_notes.assets: Do not use placeholders. Main agent must strictly map these images to their specific sections.
